narrative:
Seven Hills-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,119 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.5 percentage points.
